mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( message_id, room_id, member_id, message_type, content, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_MESSAGE_ID.NEXTVAL, #{roomId}, #{memberId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT m.room_id, m.member_id, u.username AS senderNickname, m.message_type, m.content, TO_CHAR(m.created_at, 'AM HH:MI') AS createdAt FROM chat_message m JOIN member1 u ON m.member_id = u.member_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC

SELECT chat_room_id as chatRoomId, chat_room_name as chatRoomName, chat_room_type as chatRoomType, status FROM chat_room WHERE chat_room_type = 'REGION' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY chat_room_id ASC

SELECT r.chat_room_id as chatRoomId, (SELECT u.nickname FROM chat_member m2 JOIN member2 u ON m2.member_id = u.member_id WHERE m2.chat_room_id = r.chat_room_id AND m2.member_id != #{memberId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) as chatRoomName, r.chat_room_type as chatRoomType, r.status FROM chat_room r JOIN chat_member m ON r.chat_room_id = m.chat_room_id WHERE r.chat_room_type = 'PRIVATE' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.chat_room_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_room (chat_room_id, chat_room_type, chat_room_name, region_id, status) VALUES (#{chatRoomId}, 'PRIVATE', #{chatRoomName}, 0, 'ACTIVE')
INSERT INTO chat_member (chat_member_id, chat_room_id, member_id) VALUES (SEQ_CHAT_MEMBER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{roomId}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.chat_room_id as chatRoomId, cr.chat_room_name as chatRoomName, cr.chat_room_type as chatRoomType FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_member cm ON cr.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cr.chat_room_type = 'SUPPORT' ORDER BY cr.chat_room_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_chat_room_id.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO chat_room (chat_room_id, chat_room_type, chat_room_name, status, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_ID.NEXTVAL, 'SUPPORT', 'Tripan 24시간 고객센터', '1', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_member (room_member_id, chat_room_id, member_id, joined_at) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{chatRoomId}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.chat_room_name AS chatRoomName, cr.room_type AS roomType, cr.created_at AS createdAt, cr.status AS status, m2.nickname AS userName FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_room_member crm ON cr.chat_room_id = crm.chat_room_id JOIN member1 m1 ON crm.member_id = m1.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'SUPPORT' AND m1.role != 'ROLE_ADMIN' ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_room SET status = #{status} WHERE chat_room_id = #{roomId}
